prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: 1024x1024 marketplace plugin icon
Primary request: Create a premium minimal bitmap icon for safe forensic recovery of missing Git worktrees and stale checkout pointers without destructive repository administration.
Subject: a bold branching tree node protected by a centered safety ring.
Style/medium: polished modern app icon, vector-friendly but rendered as a high-quality bitmap, flat geometric foreground with subtle dimensional polish.
Composition/framing: centered, one dominant readable silhouette, generous safe area, no small details, readable at 32x32.
Scene/backdrop: full-bleed rounded-square app-icon background built around #143C45.
Color palette: foreground uses high-contrast warm white and restrained mint accents meeting WCAG non-text contrast; background may use a smooth restrained deep teal gradient.
Materials/textures: clean solid shapes, crisp edges, no busy texture, no photo material, no UI screenshot.
Text (verbatim): none.
Constraints: no visible letters, no words, no numbers, no tiny badges, no tiny decorative dots, no thin-line illustration, no copied brand mark, no product UI, no watermark, no private names.
Avoid: generic stock logo, overly literal object collage, mascot, complex scene, skeuomorphic clutter, low contrast, text inside the icon.
checks: save the selected image into the plugin workspace as assets/icon.png
inspect the image at 1024, 64, and 32 px
reject visible text, letters, tiny details, screenshots, photos, watermarks, proprietary logos, or low contrast
keep interface.composerIcon, interface.logo, and interface.brandColor aligned with the selected asset
